title: campanula glomerata subsp. stenosiphon
intro: Campanula glomerata subsp. stenosiphon, commonly known as clustered bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Campanula glomerata subsp. stenosiphon include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
